sections.overview: The Niramaya Health Insurance Scheme was launched by the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities under the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment to provide affordable health insurance to persons with disabilities. The scheme offers coverage up to ₹1,00,000 per year.
sections.objective: To provide affordable health insurance coverage to persons with disabilities including autism, cerebral palsy, mental retardation, and multiple disabilities.
eligibility: Person must have at least one disability covered under the National Trust Act, 1999
Must have a valid disability certificate
Applicable to persons with disabilities such as autism, cerebral palsy, mental retardation, and multiple disabilities
benefits: Health insurance coverage up to ₹1,00,000 per year
Outpatient treatment including medicines, tests, and diagnostics up to ₹19,000
Coverage for surgeries and non-surgical treatments
Regular health check-ups and medical care
application_process: Submit application through Registered Organization with required documents
RO verifies and uploads details online for enrollment
Receive Health ID card after approval
Submit claims online via https://portal.mediassist.in/ or offline through claim forms
Download claim form from https://mediassisttpa.in/#claim-forms for offline submission
documents_required: Bank account details with IFSC code
Medical prescriptions and bills for claims
Original diagnostic reports and treatment records

faq.question: What is the Niramaya scheme?
faq.answer: It is a health insurance scheme for persons with disabilities providing coverage up to ₹1,00,000 per year.

faq.question: What benefits are provided under the scheme?
faq.answer: It covers hospitalization, OPD treatment, therapies, dental care, surgeries, alternative medicine, and transportation costs.

faq.question: What is the maximum coverage amount?
faq.answer: The maximum coverage amount is ₹1,00,000 per year.

faq.question: Who is eligible for the scheme?
faq.answer: Persons with disabilities covered under the National Trust Act, 1999 with a valid certificate are eligible.

faq.question: How can I find the nearest Registered Organization?
faq.answer: You can visit https://thenationaltrust.gov.in/content/registered_organization.php to find the nearest RO.

faq.question: How can the scheme be renewed?
faq.answer: Renewal can be done online through https://thenationaltrust.gov.in/auth/renew_gen.php by providing required details.

faq.question: How can claims be submitted?
faq.answer: Claims can be submitted online via https://portal.mediassist.in/ or offline using claim forms from https://mediassisttpa.in/#claim-forms.
